description: Mercantile in Arabic script. Each column is headed with a date. Each entry is in a box. Each entry begins with a name. E.g., Ṣadaqa, Barakāt, ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz, Ibrāhīm, Qāsim, Abū l-Mufaḍḍal, Barakāt, Abū l-Baqāʾ, Abū l-Khayr b. Yaḥyā, Qāsim, ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz, Abū l-Maʿālī, Hind, Abū Ṭāhir.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
